action.description: VM action to execute. Use list-configs to discover available VM/bot configurations before start. Use list-regions to discover VM manager regions.

token.description: Optional TensorFleet JWT auth token. Defaults to the token stored by tensorfleet-auth login.

vmManagerUrl.description: Optional VM Manager API base URL override. Prefer region for known TensorFleet environments

region.description: Optional TensorFleet region id. Defaults to the previously configured VM manager URL, or eu if none was configured

configId.description: Optional VM config id to use when action is start. Discover valid ids with action=list-configs.

timeout.description: Optional wait timeout in seconds. When provided for action=start, waits until the VM status becomes running. When provided for action=stop, waits until the VM status becomes stopped. If omitted, start and stop return immediately after submitting the request.

includeDev.description: Include development-only regions when action is list-regions.
